title: Cloudflare Security Audit Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard for cloudflare-reporting audit results

dns_records.description: Every DNS record per domain per run

email_checks.description: SPF, DMARC, DKIM results per domain per run

zone_settings.description: Zone security check results per domain per run

registrar_checks.description: Domain expiry and transfer lock per domain per run

dns_security.description: DNSSEC, CAA, and dangling CNAME checks per domain per run

blacklist_checks.description: DNSBL blacklist results per domain per run

reverse_dns.description: PTR / reverse DNS results per domain per run

email_standards.description: MTA-STS, TLSRPT, BIMI results per domain per run

compliance-overview.title: Compliance Overview — Latest Run
compliance-overview.description: Grade distribution across all checks for the most recent audit run
compliance-overview.sql: SELECT grade, COUNT(*) as count FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) GROUP BY grade ORDER BY CASE grade WHEN 'FAIL' THEN 1 WHEN 'WARN' THEN 2 WHEN 'INFO' THEN 3 WHEN 'PASS' THEN 4 END

zone-security-latest.title: Zone Security — Latest Run
zone-security-latest.description: All zone security checks from the most recent run
zone-security-latest.sql: SELECT domain, label as check, recommended, actual, grade, note FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) ORDER BY domain, CASE grade WHEN 'FAIL' THEN 1 WHEN 'WARN' THEN 2 WHEN 'INFO' THEN 3 WHEN 'PASS' THEN 4 END

email-security-latest.title: Email Security — Latest Run
email-security-latest.description: SPF and DMARC grades for each domain from the most recent run
email-security-latest.sql: SELECT domain, spf_grade, spf_reason, dmarc_grade, dmarc_reason, dmarc_policy FROM email_checks WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) ORDER BY domain

all-failures.title: All Failures — Latest Run
all-failures.description: Every FAIL grade across all check types in the most recent run
all-failures.sql: SELECT 'Zone Security' as category, domain, label as check, actual, grade, note FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) AND grade = 'FAIL' UNION ALL SELECT 'Email' as category, domain, 'SPF' as check, spf_record as actual, spf_grade as grade, spf_reason as note FROM email_checks WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) AND spf_grade = 'FAIL' UNION ALL SELECT 'Email' as category, domain, 'DMARC' as check, dmarc_record as actual, dmarc_grade as grade, dmarc_reason as note FROM email_checks WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) AND dmarc_grade = 'FAIL' UNION ALL SELECT 'DNS Security' as category, domain, 'Dangling CNAME' as check, dangling_reason as actual, dangling_grade as grade, dangling_reason as note FROM dns_security WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) AND dangling_grade = 'FAIL' ORDER BY category, domain

grade-trend.title: Grade Trend Over Time
grade-trend.description: How grades change across audit runs for a specific domain and check
grade-trend.sql: SELECT r.started_at, zs.domain, zs.label, zs.grade, zs.actual FROM zone_settings zs JOIN runs r ON r.id = zs.run_id WHERE zs.domain = :domain AND zs.label = :check ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 20

domain-summary.title: Domain Summary — Latest Run
domain-summary.description: Per-domain grade overview across all check types
domain-summary.sql: SELECT e.domain, e.spf_grade as SPF, e.dmarc_grade as DMARC, ds.dnssec_grade as DNSSEC, ds.caa_grade as CAA, ds.dangling_grade as 'Dangling CNAMEs', bl.grade as Blacklist, rd.grade as 'Reverse DNS', rc.expiry_grade as Expiry, rc.lock_grade as 'Transfer Lock', es.mta_sts_grade as 'MTA-STS', es.tlsrpt_grade as TLSRPT, es.bimi_grade as BIMI FROM email_checks e LEFT JOIN dns_security ds ON ds.run_id = e.run_id AND ds.domain = e.domain LEFT JOIN blacklist_checks bl ON bl.run_id = e.run_id AND bl.domain = e.domain LEFT JOIN reverse_dns rd ON rd.run_id = e.run_id AND rd.domain = e.domain LEFT JOIN registrar_checks rc ON rc.run_id = e.run_id AND rc.domain = e.domain LEFT JOIN email_standards es ON es.run_id = e.run_id AND es.domain = e.domain WHERE e.run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) ORDER BY e.domain

dns-record-count.title: DNS Records Per Domain — Latest Run
dns-record-count.description: Record count by type per domain
dns-record-count.sql: SELECT domain, type, COUNT(*) as count FROM dns_records WHERE run_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM runs) GROUP BY domain, type ORDER BY domain, count DESC

registrar-expiry.title: Domain Expiry Status
registrar-expiry.description: Expiry dates and days remaining across all runs
registrar-expiry.sql: SELECT r.started_at as audit_date, rc.domain, rc.expiry_days as days_remaining, rc.expiry_grade, rc.registrar, rc.lock_grade FROM registrar_checks rc JOIN runs r ON r.id = rc.run_id ORDER BY r.id DESC, rc.domain

audit-history.title: Audit Run History
audit-history.description: All previous audit runs with domain counts
audit-history.sql: SELECT r.id as run, r.started_at, r.domains, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT domain) FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = r.id) as domains_checked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = r.id AND grade = 'FAIL') as failures, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = r.id AND grade = 'WARN') as warnings, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zone_settings WHERE run_id = r.id AND grade = 'PASS') as passes FROM runs r ORDER BY r.id DESC
